name: PluresLM Memory
description: Read+write memory capability for OpenClaw backed by @plures/pluresdb-native: recall/search/status plus sync() ingest of session transcripts (and an optional configured source directory) into the store, via the exclusive memory capability slot.

dbPath.description: Absolute path to the PluresDB store directory (the folder containing conf/db/blobs/snap.*). When omitted, the memory capability stays inert and reports unavailable.

embeddingModel.description: HuggingFace embedding model id used for vector recall.

vectorThreshold.description: Cosine-similarity floor (0-1) for vector recall hits.

maxResults.description: Default maximum number of recall hits to return.

sourceDir.description: Optional absolute path to a directory of memory-doc source files (markdown/text). When set, a force:true sync rescans it and ingests its files as memory-source nodes. When omitted, only session transcripts passed via sessionFiles are ingested.
